items.name: NoopApp/noop
items.full_text: Offline WHOOP companion — pair your strap over Bluetooth, keep all data on your own device. No cloud, no account, no subscription.

items.name: JimLiu/baoyu-design
items.full_text: Run Claude Design locally as an Agent Skill — Cursor, Claude Code & more. Produce polished UI mockups, prototypes, decks & wireframes as self-contained HTML, without claude.ai/design. Best with Opus 4.8.

items.name: GordenSun/GordenSuperPPTSkills
items.full_text: AI PPT赛道终结者，史上最最最强 PPT Skill！！！  使用GPT生成豪华的图片格式PPT，然后转换为完全可编辑的PPTX文件。

items.name: beijingcao/binance-deribit-btc
items.full_text: Binance and Deribit BTC cross-exchange arbitrage bot with Redis state recovery, Telegram alerts, and a Flask monitoring dashboard.

items.name: TwoSevenOneT/EDRChoker
items.full_text: A tool uses the QoS Policy (Pacer.sys) to throttle Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) agents from connecting to the server.
